hiw.typewriter:
In just minutes
to the most emotional gift of your life.
hiw.step1_desc: A few bullet points are enough – we turn your memories into a song that triggers real emotions.
hiw.step2_desc: Within minutes you get a first preview. Like it? Then you decide.
hiw.step3_title: Surprise a special person with the finished song
hiw.step3_desc: Only pay when you're convinced – and experience their reaction when they hear it.
hiw.express_value: Your song ready in under 20 minutes

items.q: How personal does the song actually get?
items.a: Very personal. You provide names, memories, special moments and the occasion – our AI processes all of it into unique lyrics and a fitting melody. No song sounds like another.

items.q: What is the trailer and why is it free?
items.a: The trailer is a 30-second preview of your song – delivered free via email. We believe so strongly in the quality of our songs that we want to convince you first before you spend a cent.

items.q: Can I choose the music style myself?
items.a: Yes! You can choose from various styles: Pop, Acoustic, R&B, Classical, HipHop and more. Just specify what the recipient enjoys.

items.q: What happens if I don't like the trailer?
items.a: Nothing happens – you pay nothing. You can give us feedback and we'll create a new trailer for free. Your satisfaction is our priority.

items.q: How long does delivery of the full song take?
items.a: The trailer arrives in ~5 minutes. After payment you'll receive the full song (approx. 3 minutes) within minutes via email – sometimes even faster.

items.q: In which cases do I get a full refund?
items.a: We refund in 4 clear cases: (1) The full song doesn't match the preview (different style, different tone). (2) Your personal details were not correctly incorporated (wrong name, wrong occasion). (3) You paid without first receiving a free preview. (4) You technically cannot download the delivered MP3 and we don't resolve the issue within 48 hours.

No refund when: the song was produced correctly but you personally don't like it (that's why the free preview exists), you yourself provided incorrect information, the request comes more than 30 days after payment, or you've already downloaded and shared the song without one of the 4 refund reasons.
items.link_label: All exclusions in the refund policy →

items.q: How do I request a refund and how long does it take?
items.a: Send an email to info@audynia.com with subject: "Refund request - [your email address]" and state your refund reason (case 1–4). We respond within 24 hours and process the request in 5 business days. The refund is made via the same payment method and takes 3–10 business days depending on the provider.

items.q: Can I request a free new preview before paying?
items.a: Yes. If you don't like the 30-second preview, you can request one free new demo per order. Just write to us before payment at info@audynia.com and explain what you didn't like and what you'd prefer differently. This right exists independently of the refund guarantee.

chatbar.bubble_text: Hey! Questions about your song? I'm happy to help 🎵
chatbar.greeting:
Hi! How can I help you?
Just write to me 😊
chatbar.auto_reply:
Thank you for your message! 🎵

Our team is currently handling many requests — but don't worry, we're here for you!

Here's how to create your song in a few steps:
1️⃣ Click on "Create Song Now"
2️⃣ Choose the occasion (e.g. Birthday, Wedding, Surprise)
3️⃣ Give us personal details (names, memories, wishes)
4️⃣ Choose your music style
5️⃣ Enter your email — you'll receive your free trailer in about 5 minutes!

You're also welcome to wait here in the chat — as soon as one of our team members is free, we'll reply personally. 😊

For urgent matters you can reach us directly by email: info@audynia.com

meta.title: Audynia – Your personal song in about 1 hour
